name: Leffler, Benjamin
resolved_employer: City of Austin — Chief of Staff, Council Member Ryan Alter (District 5)
evidence: Ben (Benjamin) Leffler is Chief of Staff for Austin City Council District 5 (Ryan Alter); previously staffed CM Chris Riley and ran for the District 9 council seat in 2022, finishing third. Identity corroborated by an FEC individual-contribution record for 'Benjamin Leffler, 78722' (ActBlue, $200, 10/02/2019) matching the donor's zip exactly, plus his City of Austin candidate filer record. MPAff, LBJ School, UT-Austin.

affiliations.role: Chief of Staff; former 2022 candidate for Austin City Council District 9
affiliations.snippet: Ben Leffler ran for election to the Austin City Council to represent District 9 in Texas and lost in the general election on November 8, 2022; he was subsequently hired as chief of staff for District 5.

name: Foreman, Lauren

Industry assigned by employer fallback only. FEC contributor search and Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registry search both returned nothing under this name.

evidence: Vinetta Goodwin Witt, Ph.D., is a Greenwood, SC native and Greenwood High School graduate who retired from Newberry College in 2020 after 21 years, the last six as department chair; she holds a B.A. (South Carolina State), M.A. (Clark-Atlanta), Gerontology Certificate and Ph.D. (University of South Carolina). Greenwood residence corroborates the 29649 zip and the filing's 'Professor / Newberry College' entry. No FEC contributor record; no Texas lobbyist registration (out of state).

name: Jones, Tishaura
resolved_employer: Oneda Consulting, LLC — founder/principal (former Mayor of St. Louis, 2021–2025)
evidence: Confirmed as the former St. Louis mayor rather than assumed: Oneda Consulting, LLC is publicly documented as the strategic government-and-civic consulting firm founded by Tishaura O. Jones, the 47th Mayor of St. Louis, launched in December 2025 shortly after she left office; the firm name derives from her middle name 'Oneda'. The employer string on the filing, the St. Louis 63112 zip, and the 'Self Employed' occupation all corroborate. Previously St. Louis City Treasurer and a Missouri State Representative. No individual FEC contributor record surfaced (her FEC footprint is as a 2016 MO-01 candidate); no Texas lobbyist registration (out of state).

affiliations.role: Mayor (2021–2025); previously City Treasurer and Missouri State Representative
affiliations.snippet: Firm site describes Tishaura O. Jones as the 47th Mayor of the City of St. Louis with over 20 years of experience in local and state government, including service as St. Louis City Treasurer and Missouri State Representative.
St. Louis Post-Dispatch reported Jones launched her own consulting firm, Oneda Consulting LLC, after leaving office; the firm advises municipalities, nonprofits and advocacy groups.

name: Dupre, Alicia
resolved_employer: Y'alla Collaborative — Client Partner (independent consultant/coach; former Planned Parenthood Federation of America political staff and registered federal lobbyist)
evidence: Alicia Dupré is an Austin-based consultant who joined Y'alla Collaborative — a firm serving progressive nonprofits and funders — in early 2024 after two decades in policy and politics; she is also a National Board Certified Health & Wellness Coach listed in the Austin Wellness Collaborative directory. The Austin location, 'Consultant' occupation and self-employed/independent status match the filing; the specific 78749 zip is not independently confirmed, hence medium rather than high. Prior roles include Special Assistant to then-Democratic Whip Nancy Pelosi, Field Director for U.S. Rep. Lloyd Doggett, and political-team member and registered federal lobbyist for Planned Parenthood Federation of America. No AIPAC/UDP, J Street, NRA, oil-and-gas or defense PAC contributions surfaced; no Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration found (her lobbying was federal).

affiliations.snippet: Team bio: Alicia Dupré joined Y'alla Collaborative in early 2024 after two decades in policy and politics and several years as a certified coach. The firm works with funders, stakeholders, and visionary leaders building progressive ecosystems.
